title: How do you keep your team focused during long planning sessions?
excerpt:

posts.author: Liam2 (Liam)
posts.cookedHtml:
When our team hits a mental block during long planning sessions, we’ve found that short word or puzzle breaks really help refresh focus.

One option we’ve used is Spelling Bee Game — it’s a quick vocabulary challenge that gets everyone thinking laterally again. After 5 minutes, people come back with sharper energy, and it makes collaboration in monday.com boards a lot smoother.
